_comment: Forever Party Rentals — city data source of truth. Plan: /root/.claude/plans/we-continuous-run-into-precious-garden.md. Populated incrementally across Phase 2 steps (2.1 → 2.5).

_schema.name: Display name
_schema.coords: {lat, lng} — approximate city center, used for LocalBusiness schema geo
_schema.heroImage: Squarespace CDN URL of the hero image (preserved from current page)
_schema.neighborhoods: 3-5 named neighborhoods per city — used in hyper-local content blocks
_schema.landmarks: 2-3 venues/parks/landmarks per city — used for 'we've served events at…' mentions
_schema.driveTimeFromSurrey: Human-readable drive-time string from Forever HQ (9317 188 St, Surrey)
_schema.faqs: (Step 2.5) array of {q, a} pairs per city
_schema.testimonialIndices: (Step 2.5) indices into the top-level testimonialPool (4 per city)

testimonialPool.quote: Devon was so easy to coordinate with. Very professional, friendly and reliable. His tent set up team was amazing too! Would definitely recommend.
testimonialPool.name: Chelsea Thompson

testimonialPool.quote: I've worked in the event industry for over a decade — this is by far the best rental company I have ever worked with. Excellent communication and extras free of charge.
testimonialPool.name: Marissa K.

testimonialPool.quote: Booked a 20x40 tent for our backyard wedding. Setup was flawless, the crew showed up early, and the tent held up through a surprise downpour. Worth every dollar.
testimonialPool.name: Jenna & Michael

testimonialPool.quote: We rented chiavari chairs and round tables for our 50-person anniversary dinner. The chairs looked brand new and the team was in and out in under an hour. Incredibly easy.
testimonialPool.name: Raymond D.

testimonialPool.quote: Ordered online on a Sunday night and had a crew at our venue Tuesday morning. The online booking made it so simple — I didn't have to chase anyone for a quote.
testimonialPool.name: Priya S.

testimonialPool.quote: We've used Forever for three corporate events now. On-time every time, professional crew, and the inventory is always spotless. Our go-to rental partner.
testimonialPool.name: Daniel L.

testimonialPool.quote: The dance floor was the highlight of our reception — perfectly level, looked gorgeous, and they installed it around our existing setup without any issues.
testimonialPool.name: Alexandra M.

testimonialPool.quote: Tent, tables, chairs, dance floor, and heaters for 120 guests. The 25% deposit model made it easy to budget, and the early-pay discount saved us real money.
testimonialPool.name: Omar H.

testimonialPool.quote: I had to reschedule twice because of weather. Devon was completely understanding both times and rolled the deposit forward without any hassle. Phenomenal customer service.
testimonialPool.name: Kelsey V.

testimonialPool.quote: From the first phone call to the final pickup, every interaction was friendly and professional. This team actually cares about your event. Five stars isn't enough.
testimonialPool.name: Graham R.

surrey.name: Surrey
surrey.driveTimeFromSurrey: Our warehouse is in Surrey — 10-25 minutes to most neighborhoods
surrey.intro: Forever Party Rentals is based right here in Surrey, and there's nothing we enjoy more than setting up events in our own backyard. From backyard birthday parties in Cloverdale to corporate luncheons in Guildford, summer weddings in South Surrey, and school celebrations in Fleetwood, we've served hundreds of Surrey events and know every neighbourhood by name. Our warehouse is 10 to 25 minutes from wherever you're hosting — shorter delivery windows, fewer surprises, and more flexibility if your setup plans change last minute. Whether you're renting a 20x40 marquee tent for a wedding at Hazelmere, Chiavari chairs for a reception near the Surrey Arts Centre, or round tables and a dance floor for a family party in Newton, we deliver, hand-set, and return for pickup — always on time. Book online 24/7 or call us any day of the week; someone friendly always picks up.

faqs.q: Do you deliver party rentals to Surrey?
faqs.a: Yes — we're based right here in Surrey, with our warehouse at 9317 188 St. We deliver and set up throughout the city, including Cloverdale, Fleetwood, and Newton. Delivery and setup are included in every quote, with no surprise fees at the venue.

faqs.q: What's included in the delivery and setup fee?
faqs.a: Every rental includes round-trip delivery, professional setup of tents and dance floors, takedown, and pickup. Chairs and tables are stacked and placed where you want them. There are no hidden charges or fuel surcharges — the price you see at checkout is the price you pay.

faqs.q: How far in advance should I book for an event in Surrey?
faqs.a: For peak season (May through September) in Surrey, we recommend booking 6–8 weeks out — especially for weekend weddings. Off-season and weekday events can often be booked 1–2 weeks out. You can check live availability and reserve with a 25% deposit on our online booking page 24/7.

faqs.q: Have you worked at venues in Surrey like Bear Creek Park?
faqs.a: Yes — we regularly deliver rentals to Bear Creek Park, Cloverdale Rodeo Grounds, and Surrey Arts Centre and dozens of private residences across Surrey. We know the setback rules for most public parks in Surrey and can advise on what permits (if any) your venue requires for tents.

faqs.q: Can you set up a tent on grass, gravel, or a paved driveway?
faqs.a: Yes to all three. Our marquee tents use stake-down installation on grass and ballasted (weighted) installation on pavement, gravel, and stamped concrete. Tell us the surface when you book and we'll send the right hardware. We do not tent on artificial turf.

faqs.q: What happens if the weather is bad or I need to cancel?
faqs.a: Our 125% Cancellation Protection means if we ever cancel your booking, you receive 125% of your deposit back. If you need to reschedule because of weather, we'll roll your deposit forward to a new date at no charge — as long as we're notified before crew dispatch. Cancellations initiated by the customer are subject to our standard deposit terms.

langley.name: Langley
langley.driveTimeFromSurrey: About 15-20 minutes from our Surrey warehouse via Fraser Highway
langley.intro: Langley is one of our busiest markets — just a 15-20 minute drive from our Surrey warehouse via the Fraser Highway — and we love it for the same reason our clients do: it's where the Fraser Valley starts to feel rural, with wineries, berry farms, and heritage properties that host some of the most beautiful weddings and corporate retreats in the Lower Mainland. We've rolled marquee tents across lawns at Krause Berry Farms, delivered Chiavari chairs to private estates in Brookswood and Murrayville, and set up dance floors for tournaments at the Langley Events Centre. Whether your event is downtown, in Willowbrook, or out in Campbell Valley near Township 7 Vineyards, we'll arrive on time, hand-set each piece, and return for pickup without interrupting your day. Book online 24/7 and we'll confirm your Langley date in minutes — a 25% deposit secures it.

faqs.q: Do you deliver party rentals to Langley?
faqs.a: Yes — we deliver and set up throughout Langley, including Brookswood, Murrayville, and Willowbrook. From our Surrey warehouse, it's about 15-20 minutes via Fraser Highway. Delivery and setup are included in every quote, with no surprise fees at the venue.

faqs.a: Yes to all three. Our marquee tents use stake-down installation on grass and ballasted (weighted) installation on pavement, gravel, and stamped concrete. Tell us the surface when you book and we'll send the right hardware. We do not tent on artificial turf.

vancouver.name: Vancouver
vancouver.driveTimeFromSurrey: Roughly 40-55 minutes from Surrey via Highway 1 and the Port Mann Bridge
vancouver.intro: Serving Vancouver from our Surrey warehouse means crossing the Port Mann Bridge, but that hasn't stopped us from becoming one of the city's most-booked tent and chair rental companies — with over 200 five-star Google reviews to show for it. We've lit up rooftop patios in Yaletown, tucked Chiavari chair setups into Kitsilano beachfront gardens, installed marquee tents at weddings overlooking Queen Elizabeth Park, and delivered round tables for reunions in Dunbar and the West End. Vancouver's parks and heritage venues, from Stanley Park to the VanDusen Botanical Garden, each have their own access quirks — we've worked with them all, and we know which loading zones open when. Typical drive time from our warehouse is 40-55 minutes, so we build realistic windows into every quote. Book online 24/7, any day of the week — live availability, instant confirmation.

faqs.a: Yes — we deliver and set up throughout Vancouver, including Kitsilano, East Vancouver, and Yaletown. From our Surrey warehouse, it's roughly 40-55 minutes via Highway 1 and the Port Mann Bridge. Delivery and setup are included in every quote, with no surprise fees at the venue.

burnaby.name: Burnaby
burnaby.driveTimeFromSurrey: About 35-45 minutes from our Surrey warehouse via Highway 1
burnaby.intro: Forever Party Rentals delivers marquee tents, Chiavari chairs, banquet and round tables, and polished dance floors across every corner of Burnaby — from Metrotown condos hosting rooftop birthdays, to backyard weddings in Deer Lake, corporate summits in Brentwood office plazas, and grad parties in Edmonds and North Burnaby. Deer Lake Park, Central Park, and the Shadbolt Centre for the Arts are local venues we return to year after year. Our Surrey warehouse is a straightforward 35-45 minute drive via Highway 1, which lets us offer flexible same-week setup windows when planning gets compressed. Delivery, setup, and pickup are bundled into every quote — no surprise fees when we arrive. If you want to browse live inventory, pick your date, and lock in a Burnaby booking right now, you can do it in under five minutes online, 24 hours a day.

abbotsford.name: Abbotsford
abbotsford.driveTimeFromSurrey: About 35-45 minutes from Surrey via Highway 1
abbotsford.intro: Abbotsford is roughly 35-45 minutes from our Surrey warehouse via Highway 1, and it's one of the most rewarding cities we serve — Fraser Valley weddings have a specific setting that demands equipment that can stand up to wind, grass, long afternoons, and golden-hour photos. We've installed marquee tents for ceremonies at Swaneset Bay Resort, set up Chiavari chairs and banquet tables at private properties on Sumas Mountain, and delivered round tables and linens for corporate events at the Tradex Exhibition Centre. Whether your event is in Clearbrook, Matsqui, Sandy Hill, or just across the Aldergrove border, our Abbotsford party rentals arrive on time, hand-set, and ready to photograph. coquitlam.name: Coquitlam
coquitlam.driveTimeFromSurrey: About 35-45 minutes from our Surrey warehouse
coquitlam.intro: Coquitlam is one of our favourite cities to serve — a 35-45 minute trip from our Surrey warehouse that lands us at Lafarge Lake, Town Centre Park, Mundy Park, or any of the family backyards across Town Centre, Westwood Plateau, Burke Mountain, Maillardville, and Eagle Ridge. We've set up marquee tents for backyard receptions in Westwood, Chiavari chair ceremonies at Minnekhada Regional Park, and banquet tables for corporate events at Blue Mountain Park. Coquitlam's parks require particular attention to access permits and turf protection, and our team handles all of that quietly — you'll never notice the logistics because we've already sorted them. Delivery, professional setup, and end-of-event pickup are bundled into every quote, so no surprise charges when we roll up. Book online 24/7, browse live inventory with dates, and secure your Coquitlam booking with a 25% deposit.

richmond.name: Richmond
richmond.driveTimeFromSurrey: About 40-50 minutes from Surrey via the Alex Fraser Bridge
richmond.intro: Richmond runs on precision — event start times at the River Rock Show Theatre, weather considerations along Garry Point Park in Steveston, and the pace of international-style weddings that have made the Richmond Olympic Oval a destination venue. Forever Party Rentals has worked Richmond events from backyard birthdays in Seafair to formal receptions in Terra Nova, cocktail gatherings in Brighouse, and cultural celebrations in Hamilton and Thompson. We're roughly 40-50 minutes from your event via the Alex Fraser Bridge, which we factor into every delivery window so you're never waiting past your setup time. Our inventory of marquee tents, Chiavari chairs, banquet and round tables, and elegant dance floors arrives pressure-washed, hand-inspected, and ready to photograph. Book your Richmond party rentals online 24/7 with live date availability, or call any day of the week for a custom consultation.

maple-ridge.name: Maple Ridge
maple-ridge.driveTimeFromSurrey: Just 30-40 minutes from Surrey via the Golden Ears Bridge
maple-ridge.intro: Maple Ridge sits just over the Golden Ears Bridge — 30-40 minutes from our Surrey warehouse — which makes it a quick, reliable delivery route for us and a beautiful backdrop for your event. We've installed marquee tents for weddings along the Alouette Lake shoreline, set up Chiavari chairs at private celebrations near Kanaka Creek Regional Park, and delivered round tables and dance floors to backyards in Hammond, Silver Valley, Albion, Port Haney, and Whonnock. Golden Ears Provincial Park is one of the most photogenic ceremony sites in British Columbia, and we've done enough events there to know exactly how the wind behaves by mid-afternoon. Delivery, setup, and pickup are bundled into every quote — you focus on the guests and the ceremony, we handle the infrastructure. Book your Maple Ridge rentals online 24/7, with a 25% deposit securing your date.

north-vancouver.name: North Vancouver
north-vancouver.driveTimeFromSurrey: About 55-70 minutes from Surrey via the Ironworkers Memorial Bridge
north-vancouver.intro: North Vancouver is one of the most scenic — and most logistically demanding — cities we serve. The trip from our Surrey warehouse runs 55-70 minutes via the Ironworkers Memorial Bridge, and North Van's neighbourhoods each have their own access quirks: steep Lonsdale driveways, the hairpin roads out to Deep Cove, and tight venue lanes around Capilano and Lynn Valley. We've handled it all — marquee tents for mountainside weddings near Grouse Mountain, Chiavari chairs for ceremonies at Capilano Suspension Bridge Park, round tables for family reunions in Edgemont, and banquet tables for corporate events along Lonsdale Quay. Our team arrives with realistic windows built around traffic across the bridge, so you're never waiting. Book your North Vancouver party rentals online 24/7 with live availability, or call us any day of the week — 200+ five-star Google reviews speak to how well we handle this city.

white-rock.name: White Rock
white-rock.driveTimeFromSurrey: About 20-30 minutes from our Surrey warehouse
white-rock.intro: White Rock has the kind of light that makes beach weddings look effortless — and Forever Party Rentals is the local team making sure the setup is as polished as the photos. About 20-30 minutes from our Surrey warehouse, we've handled tent installations along Marine Drive, Chiavari chair ceremonies at Semiahmoo Park, and banquet tables for milestone birthdays and anniversaries in Centennial Park, the Uptown core, and Hillside. White Rock Pier and the Promenade have strict access rules; we know them, we've worked with them, and we plan our delivery windows around tide and city-access schedules. Peace Arch Park ceremonies get the same treatment. Delivery, professional setup, and pickup are bundled — no hidden fees, no surprises.
